message:
fix(stdlib): preserve negative sign for fractional numbers in json_stringify

When json_stringify encountered negative fractional numbers where the
integer part was zero (e.g., -0.5), the sign was lost because
units = n / FP_SCALE produced 0, and the negative prefix was only
emitted when units < 0. The fix explicitly prepends "-" when
n < 0 && units == 0.

Adds a regression test verifying that -0.5 serializes as "-0.5"
rather than "0.5".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
